wrong_finding.title: Profile update does not invalidate Redis cache; reads serve stale data for up to 5 minutes

why_wrong: Two errors. (1) Category 'data-race' implies concurrent mutation: there is no race here, just a missing invalidation step. Correct: 'cache-staleness'. (2) SEV-1 escalates a 5-minute bounded staleness on non-sensitive data to a release-blocker; that misuses the rubric. The escalator to SEV-2/SEV-1 requires the staleness window > 5 minutes AND auth/financial/PII data; neither condition holds here. Correct: SEV-3 / R-SEV3-09.
